context: Verify that the agent produces a valid, strict-mode tsconfig.json with no disabled safety flags, plus explanatory notes.

checklist.name: `strict: true` is present
checklist.description: The `compilerOptions` block contains `"strict": true` and does not contain any option that directly disables a strict-mode sub-flag (e.g., `"strictNullChecks": false`).

checklist.name: At least two extra strictness flags enabled
checklist.description: The config includes at least two additional flags beyond the `strict` bundle, such as `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`, `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`, `noImplicitReturns`, or `noFallthroughCasesInSwitch`.

checklist.name: Target and module settings appropriate for Node 20 ESM
checklist.description: `target` is set to `ES2022` or later and `module` is set to `NodeNext` or `Node16` (not `CommonJS`) to reflect Node 20 native ESM.

checklist.name: tsconfig-notes.md covers each non-obvious option
checklist.description: The notes file provides at least one sentence per non-obvious option explaining what it does and why it was chosen.
